data.body: ALL LAYER-0 GREEN: c085 #812, 0b96 #813, ed13 #814, 8bc5 #815 all LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1. Layer-1 first-pass reviews all BLOCK: 3275(4,gitignore .rebar/* blanket needs !negation), 7931(2,compute must return None), 3c07(5,COMPLETION_VERDICT has no metrics block per 8bc5 research; 'accepted'!=plan-review PASS), 5062(9,tests/unit/scripts missing dir; plan-review BLOCK not in compiled state), 18e6(12,reduce_ticket returns collapsed state NOT event sequence; 'Verified -1' doesn't exist). Remediated 3275+7931, re-review running. Dispatched investigation for 3c07/5062/18e6 grounding. Close gate uses source=attested ref=HEAD (reads local HEAD) so Layer-0 closable against unlanded stack.
